taxonomy: Pachidendron supralaeve is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Pachidendron. This plant is native to the Philippines, specifically the islands of Luzon and Mindanao. The classification of Pachidendron supralaeve is within the order Magnoliales and the class Magnoliopsida. The exact classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and order.
